name: fenek-portfolio-companion
description: Read-only aggregator of your portfolio data across EU-available wallets, exchanges and brokers (Trading 212, Bybit incl. derivatives & Earn, Bitcoin/Litecoin/Dogecoin/Solana/TON wallets). Data collection only — no recommendations.
long_description:
An unofficial, open-source MCP server that aggregates your portfolio data across wallets, exchanges and brokers available in Europe — Trading 212, Bybit, and Bitcoin/Litecoin/Dogecoin/Solana/TON wallets — and exposes it read-only to Claude for analysis. Ask about positions, pies, dividends, balances, derivatives exposure, Earn/staked balances, concentration, and overlaps in plain language. On Bybit it reads every money bucket: Unified coins, derivatives positions with leverage and liquidation price, Earn products with APY, the Funding wallet, and total equity across all account types. Strictly data collection plus neutral metrics on your own data; it never recommends trades. No telemetry. API keys are stored in your OS keychain.

New here? After installing, run the fenek_getting_started prompt (or tool) in chat — it explains what to set up and which sources are supported, and needs no keys. All fields below are optional: fill in only the sources you have.

Not affiliated with any broker. Not financial advice.

T212_API_KEY.title: Trading 212 · API Key
T212_API_KEY.description: Read-only key from Trading 212 → Settings → API (Beta). Blank to skip Trading 212.

T212_API_SECRET.title: Trading 212 · API Secret
T212_API_SECRET.description: Shown once when you create the key.

WALLET_ADDRESSES.title: Crypto · Wallet addresses (public)
WALLET_ADDRESSES.description: Public wallet addresses separated by commas, spaces, or new lines; the chain of each (Solana, TON, Bitcoin, Litecoin, Dogecoin) is detected automatically and read keyless — no API key. These are public addresses, not secrets. Blank to skip crypto.

BYBIT_API_KEY.title: Bybit · API key
BYBIT_API_KEY.description: Read-only key — no Trade, no Withdraw, no Transfer. Tick the read groups: Unified Trading (balances, positions), Assets/Wallet (Funding wallet, totals overview), Earn (staked positions). Blank to skip Bybit.

BYBIT_API_SECRET.title: Bybit · API secret
BYBIT_API_SECRET.description: Shown once when you create the Bybit key. Stored in your OS keychain.

LICENSE_KEY.title: Fenek Pro · License key
LICENSE_KEY.description: License key for Fenek Pro — unlocks the crypto sources (Bybit, on-chain wallets). Subscribe at fenek.tech to get one, or build Pro from source for free. Leave blank to use the free classic brokers (Trading 212) and portfolio analytics.

CHECK_UPDATES.title: Check for updates weekly
CHECK_UPDATES.description: Once a week Fenek asks api.github.com for the latest release number. Only the version number is read. Turning it off stops that check; on a free build it leaves only your broker APIs (Fenek Pro still runs its monthly license check).
